description_long: This lamp features a central, vertically ribbed column made of light-colored wood, anchored by a wide, faceted base that provides stability. Six slender, curved metal arms radiate symmetrically from the top of the column, each ending in a circular holder supporting a white cylindrical candle. The arms are a warm copper or bronze tone, contrasting with the pale wood and white candles. The design is reminiscent of a traditional candelabrum, blending rustic and industrial aesthetics. The base appears solid and heavy, while the arms are thin but sturdy, giving the lamp an elegant, open structure. The overall form is decorative and functional, suitable for ambient lighting in urban parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor settings.
description: A six-armed candelabrum-style lamp with a light wood base, copper-toned metal arms, and white cylindrical candles. The design is both rustic and elegant, ideal for decorative urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three candle arms prominently on the left and three on the right, with the ribbed wooden column and faceted base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the symmetrical spread of the metal arms and the depth of the base, with the candles forming a semi-circle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with the arms and candles oriented in the opposite direction, showing the even distribution of the arms.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, emphasizing the curvature of the arms and the robust base structure.
